extDescription.message: A privacy-focused, open-source mouse gesture extension for seamless browsing. Enjoy responsive gestures and super drag support.

privacyNote.message: Runs locally, no network access except sync, no data collection

supportUsText.message: Enjoying FlowMouse? Please give us a 5-star rating on the %appStoreInfo% to support us!

feedbackText.message: Issues or suggestions? Please report via Email, GitHub or Forum. We'll improve it ASAP!

enableGestureDesc.message: Hold the right mouse button and move the mouse to easily perform gestures
enableGestureDesc.description: Hold the right mouse button and move the mouse to easily perform gestures

gestureTriggerButtonsDesc.message: Select which mouse buttons can trigger gestures

btnSide1Mouse.description: Mouse button 4 — the side button typically used for navigating back

btnSide2Mouse.description: Mouse button 5 — the side button typically used for navigating forward

btnPenRight.description: The secondary (right-click) button on a stylus / digital pen

triggerButtonDriverWarning.message: Some trigger buttons may not work correctly depending on your hardware or driver settings. For example, Logitech mice may require disabling "Horizontal Scrolling" in the driver to use side buttons for gestures.
triggerButtonDriverWarning.description: Warning shown when side buttons or stylus right button is enabled as a gesture trigger

macLinuxContextMenuNotice.message: Due to system limitations, when right-click gestures are enabled, a double right-click is required to open the context menu on macOS / Linux.
macLinuxContextMenuNotice.description: Notice for macOS / Linux users about double right-click for context menu

macLinuxDoubleClickHint.message: To open the context menu, double right-click. (Learn more)
macLinuxDoubleClickHint.description: Short toast hint shown on first right-click on macOS/Linux explaining double-click requirement

edgeGestureConflictNotice.message: %browserName% has built-in gesture features. To use FlowMouse's gestures, please disable the built-in gestures in %browserName% settings.
edgeGestureConflictNotice.description: Notice for Edge users about built-in gesture conflict

macTextDragNotice.message: Due to macOS behavior, when dragging text, first select the text, then press and hold the left button within the selected area and pause briefly before dragging. Otherwise, the drag function may not trigger.
macTextDragNotice.description: Notice for macOS users about text drag behavior

showTrailDesc.description: Show trail line when performing gestures

showHintDesc.description: Show current gesture action in center of screen

smoothnessAuto.description: Auto scroll smoothness - uses system if animation enabled, otherwise smooth

scrollAccel.description: Speed multiplier applied when scrolling consecutively

scrollAccelWindow.description: Max time (ms) between scrolls to count as consecutive

emptyBlacklist.message: No blacklisted sites. Enter a domain above to add.

menuRemoveFromBlacklist.description: Context menu title for removing current site from blacklist

Importing will overwrite your current settings. Only import configuration files from trusted sources.

distanceThresholdNotice.message: Tip: A value between 15-30 is recommended for best recognition.
distanceThresholdNotice.description: Warning when distance threshold is too small or too large

gestureTurnTolerance.description: Turn tolerance for detecting direction changes in long gestures

gestureTurnToleranceDesc.message: Higher values reduce accidental turns but require longer movements to change direction

advanced.description: Short label for per-section advanced toggle

urlFormatError.message: Please enter full URL starting with http:// or https://

resetToDefaultConfirm.message: Reset these settings to default values?

aboutPrivacyText.message: This extension is an open-source project with code hosted on GitHub. Contributions and code review are welcome. All data processing is done locally on your device. The extension itself does not establish any network connections and has no backend servers, so it does not collect or upload any user data to external servers. Your saved settings are encrypted and synced between your logged-in devices via %browserName% browser's built-in sync service. This process is entirely controlled by the browser and follows your browser's privacy and sync settings.

aboutCreditsText.message:
Thanks to Microsoft Edge browser and crxMouse extension for design inspiration.
Thanks to 52pojie.cn community and users for feedback and suggestions!

aboutFeature6.message: 🔒 Runs Locally, No Network Except Sync

reducedMotionWarning.message: %OS% system animation is disabled, scroll animation may not work properly. You can enable animation in %OS% system settings.
reducedMotionWarning.description: Warning message when system reduced motion is enabled

menuNeedRefresh.message: FlowMouse not loaded, click to refresh
menuNeedRefresh.description: Context menu title for pages needing refresh

menuRestricted.description: Context menu title for restricted pages

showRestrictedNotice.description: Setting title for restricted page notice

showRestrictedNoticeDesc.message: Show context menu notice on pages where gestures are unavailable
showRestrictedNoticeDesc.description: Setting description for restricted page notice

restrictedPagesDetailsTitle.message: Due to browser security policies, extensions cannot run on certain types of pages.

restrictedNewTabDesc.message: The browser's default new tab page is a protected system page. Extensions cannot inject scripts or modify content here.

restrictedStoreDesc.message: For example, %storeInfo%, etc. Browsers prevent extensions from running on these pages to protect the store's normal operation.

restrictedInternalDesc.message: For example, %browserName%'s internal settings, history, downloads, etc. These pages involve core browser functions and user privacy data, so they are strictly protected.

restrictedFileDesc.message: Local html, pdf, etc. files opened via file:// protocol. Due to security restrictions (preventing malicious extensions from accessing the local file system), extensions cannot work on these pages.

restrictedViewSourceDesc.message: The browser's source code viewer is also a protected system page. Extensions cannot run here.

restrictedOther.message: Other less common affected pages are not listed separately.

popupNeedRefresh.description: Popup title when content script not loaded

popupNeedRefreshDesc.message: This page was opened before the extension was installed/updated. Refresh to enable gestures.
popupNeedRefreshDesc.description: Popup description when content script not loaded

popupRestrictedDesc.message: This page cannot use gestures due to browser security restrictions.

simulateKeyHint.message: This feature only sends keyboard events to the current page, commonly used for page navigation (← previous / → next). It will NOT trigger browser shortcuts (e.g., Ctrl+R will not refresh). Additionally, due to website framework limitations, the simulated events may not be captured by all custom components or input fields.
simulateKeyHint.description: Hint text for simulate key feature

customEventInvalidJson.description: Error message when event detail is not valid JSON

customEventHint.message: Dispatches %code% on %window%. Useful for integration with other scripts.

chainStepCount.description: Step count for unnamed chains, e.g. '3 steps'

chainStepCountOne.description: Step count for unnamed chains with exactly 1 step
